lore.english:
Taimanin. An executive who serves the Nisha clan, one of the eight branches of the Fuuma clan. She is said to have served the very first Fuuma Kotaro, but if that were true, she would have been alive for at least 500 years. She once served as an advisor to the previous Fuuma Kotaro, Danjo, but has since stepped down from an executive role and now looks after other young executives of the Nisha clan.

She is a user of the Evil Eye known as the "Mermaid's Azure Eye". With the blue iris of her right eye, she drains the life energy of those she gazes upon, converting it into her vitality. It is said that those whose life energy has been completely drained are transformed into inhuman, fish‑like monstrosities resembling merfolk.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Soul Orb[-]
skills.description:
Throws [A:9701] energy spheres at the enemy in sequence.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Confuse] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:970102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:970102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Soul Wave[-]
skills.description:
Fires a powerful laser at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Restraint] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:970202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:970202] turn(s)
Reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:970203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:970203]%[-] chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Evil Eye: Mermaid's Azure Eye[-]
skills.description:
Drains life energy from [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Upon energy drain, steals [V3:970302] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] the target has at a [&Color_Cyan][R:970302]%[-] chance.
If the target is the only one remaining, guaranteed to steal [&Buff].
